title: centaurea mollis
intro: Centaurea mollis, also known as soft knapweed, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Centaurea mollis include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. Centaurea mollis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal uses, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it for therapeutic purposes.
